title: ABVMU UP CAHET Entrance Test Online Form 2026
short_information: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh has released the UP Common Allied Healthcare Entrance Test CAHET Notification 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 02/05/2026 to 05/06/2026.candidates should read the CAHET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the Common Allied Healthcare Entrance Test CAHET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, GNM Nursing Courses, information and other types of information and then apply. Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University, Uttar Pradesh Uttar Pradesh Common Allied Healthcare Entrance Test (CAHET) 2026 ABVMU CAHET 2026 Exam : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: For UG Courses : General / OBC / EWS: 750/- SC / ST / PH : 500/- For PG Courses : General / OBC / EWS: 3000/- SC / ST / PH : 2000/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking Only. UP Common Allied Healthcare Entrance Test CAHET

tables.table_name: UP Common Allied Healthcare Entrance Test CAHET Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 31/12/2026 Minimum Age : 17 Years. Maximum Age : NA Age Relaxation Extra as per ABVMU, Lucknow UP Common Allied Healthcare Entrance Test (CAHET) Admissions Rules.
